title: K-1B
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''K-1B''' was a kind of medical and translator droid used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] where one treated [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] for the injuries he received at the hands of [[Nil Spaar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
